Name: Highpeak Energy Acquisition Corp
Description: HighPeak Energy, Inc., an independent oil and natural gas company, is engaged in the acquisition, exploration, development and production of oil, natural gas and natural gas liquid reserves in the Midland Basin in West Texas. The company is headquartered in Fort Worth, Texas.
